scope: first implementation slice of the generated-build lane: read-only python-only runtime detector + CLI + fixture tests; no template rendering, no build proof, no runtime proof, no API/UI surfacing, no integration with existing build paths

phase_a_detector_module.output_conformance: matches contracts/generated-build-contract.schema.json (validated by tests when jsonschema is importable)
phase_a_detector_module.side_effects: none — strictly read-only; never writes Dockerfiles, never runs docker, never reaches network

phase_b_scope_held.python_family_path: implemented end-to-end (detection only — status: proposed when accepted)
phase_b_scope_held.node_and_go_families: hard signals recognised; refused with refusal_reason: runtime_family_not_in_first_wave
phase_b_scope_held.polyglot: refused with refusal_reason: polyglot_repo_no_per_service_map when 2+ in-wave families show hard signals

phase_c_strict_rules.existing_build_pre_emption_checked_first: yes — refuses even when python signals are also present
phase_c_strict_rules.polyglot_conflict_refusal: yes — fires when 2+ in-wave families show hard signals (proven by python+node test)
phase_c_strict_rules.no_guessing_past_confidence_scale: yes — only `accepted` clears the threshold for status==proposed; `high`/`medium`/`low` paths intentionally not exposed in this slice

phase_d_proof.test_results: 12/12 pass; combined with command_builder runtime tests: 29/29 pass
fixture_trees_covered: python_fastapi: pyproject.toml + requirements.txt + app.py + fastapi/uvicorn deps
python_minimal_no_soft: requirements.txt only with no entrypoint and no framework hint
node_express: package.json + package-lock.json + index.js + express dep
file_as_root: regular file passed instead of directory
phase_d_proof.schema_conformance_test: validates artifacts against contracts/generated-build-contract.schema.json when jsonschema is importable; skips otherwise (so the suite stays runnable in slim envs)

self_consistency_check_run_against_repos.verdict: expected — repos/amof already ships Dockerfile.controlplane, so the existing-build pre-emption path correctly fires

commits_landed_to_canonical_main.summary: feat(generated-build): UP9-1 read-only python-only detector prototype

what_to_implement_next: Add scripts/amof/generated_build/template_renderer.py with one entry point: render_python_uvicorn_distroless_v1(artifact, output_path) -> Path that writes a Dockerfile based on the proposed artifact's signals/entrypoint/inferred_port.

The template should produce a multi-stage Dockerfile FROM python:3.12-slim with a pinned entrypoint and the inferred port exposed. No PyPI mirroring assumptions; the template assumes host docker network.
Wire a CLI subcommand: `python -m amof.generated_build render <repo_path> --out <dockerfile_path>` that runs the detector first and writes only when the artifact is `proposed`.
Update artifact emission so when render succeeds the artifact's `dockerfile_template.rendered_path` is populated and `template_not_yet_rendered` is dropped from `risk_flags`.
Add focused tests asserting the rendered Dockerfile shape against a snapshot; do NOT run docker build in this slice.
what_to_explicitly_defer: Build proof execution (next slice after rendering)
Contract flip, dispatch wiring, chart integration
